top_signals.title: India RBI to Pay Record Dividend, Misses Market Estimates
top_signals.summary: India’s central bank will transfer 2.87 trillion rupees ($30 billion) to the government, a record but one that fell short of expectations even as the Iran war pushes up energy prices and strains public finances.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
